title: Herbal Chewy Mexican Shrimp
description: A kid-friendly herbal and chewy shrimp dish infused with Mexican spices for a delightful snack that's also jain-friendly.

ingredients.name: Shrimp
ingredients.notes: Fresh or frozen, peeled and deveined

ingredients.name: Cumin
ingredients.notes: Whole seeds or powder, optional for added depth

instructions: Combine mayonnaise and lime juice in a mixing bowl.
Add chopped cilantro to the mixture.
Stir in red pepper flakes, garlic powder, and cumin if using.
Gently fold shrimp into the mayo-cilantro-lime sauce until evenly coated.
Transfer to an oven-safe dish or shallow baking pan for serving.
Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 12-15 minutes, until heated through and slightly crispy on top.
